commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd ~/platform/data/smoker-shard-a && find . -name run-state.json -prune -o -name "*.json" -print 2>/dev/null | head -3'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd ~/platform/data/smoker-shard-a && F=$(find . -name run-state.json -prune -o -name "*.json" -print 2>/dev/null | head -1); head -c 3000 "$F"'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd ~/platform/data/smoker-shard-a && F=$(find . -name run-state.json -prune -o -name "*.json" -print 2>/dev/null | head -1); python3.11 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(list(d.keys()))" "$F"'
